SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF NADINE BROWNING IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF FERRELL GOODMAN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WIFE NADINE BROWNING. DEFENDANT LYUDMILA ARONOVA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWNING, NADINE GOODMAN, FARRELL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARONOVA, LYUDMILA THE LEASE AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES ASSIGNED TO THE PLAINTIFFS THE OBLIGATION TO MAINTAIN THE KITCHEN FAUCET.
